reviews.review_description: Man, this game had SOOOOOO much potential, if only the creator didn't stop working on this game it would've been so good man. Sad to see such a good game go down like this

Needs lots of work, more realistic blocking, better ai and more, but I see it being the best types of game with more work
￼
Lots of styles! NPCs in this game are smart. They out maneuver the player, dodge, change angles and even counter attacks, very challenging.

reviews.review_title: Took a chance and it's good!
reviews.review_description: The fighting feels good. Lots of different styles.  Different weapons.  1 hit kills like Bushido blade.  Even the judo throws work pretty well.  One of the best VR fighting games.

Very clunky, awkward and does not feel anything like a real fight, or even an arcade style brawler.

Was hoping for something like TOTF or even Path of the warrior

I have been training kungfu for several years, and during Covid I started using Thrill of the Fight to better my cardio. I was intrigued by the premise of this game, and I tried it out for 20 minutes. it is quite good for cardio, and it is fun to see the different styles applied. There are some things though that I hope will change in future releases: 
1) It is designed for standing and sitting while playing, and movement is best achieved with the joystick. 
While it is possible to really walk, you do not see where you are relative to the guardian - in the heat of sparring, this is not good enough and I feel insecure to really move. It would be easy to change this, if the border of the guardian would be displayed as a colored line on the floor, as is done in Thrill of the Fight. That way, large range movements could still be done with the joy stick, and short range movement by real steps. And backwards movement with the joystick should not be possible at the same speed as forward movement. Currently it is possible to outrun the opponent moving forward when you are moving backward. 
2) Behavior at "lethal hits"
When you receive a "lethal" hit, the camera switches from 1P to 3P, which is quite disorienting. 
3) Weapons
Unfortunately, the way you hold weapons are unnatural. The hilt is not aligned with the controller, but it is at a degree that makes it hard to stab, for instance. The hilt of a sword or knife should be identical to the controller. Also, for whatever reason, sometimes the sword in my hand simply disappears in mid-fight, even though I didn't open the hand. Sometimes I can then find it lying on the floor, and sometimes it is simply gone. If there is a reason for this (for instance the opponent has disarmed me), then I need some clue to what has happened. 
4) Hand size
While the position of the hands relative to my body is exact, the hands are twice the size of my real hands. I could not find a setting to change the hand size. 
Nice work though!

developer_response.body: Hi, Thanks for the feedback! I will be tweaking this game in future releases for sure. The workload of developing this was huge (and i worked on my own), so there are things rough around edges..

reviews.review_description: Wanted to love this game as I play Dragon Fist and I was expecting the same quality but with the bonus of different martial arts styles. Unfortunately it's unplayable, extremely janky and laggy punches, weapons are ridiculous like rubber. The menus keep getting stuck and unable to click buttons. I got stuck in the heavy bag room as the menu wasn't working and I had to quit and open the game again to get out. If this game was Dragon Fist quality it would be amazing. Please keep working on it and hopefully I will repurchase it. Refunding for now sorry guys!
The game is pretty good all it needs is a better combat system where we can use our legs and arms and be able to grapple

reviews.review_title: Good game but I think it needs tutorials
reviews.review_description: Pretty fun but I think all the martial arts need basic tutorials. With like counter attacks and stuff. Also I think the kick needs to be a different button

developer_response.body: just fixed kick button today! now its the primary button of each controller (X/A)

reviews.review_description: legs you cannot use it would helpful for judo throws cause almost every judo throw uses legs so pls add legs the game is good

For a long time I've been looking for a game that feels like a bruce lee movie and I finally found it, the game has great enemy ai, combat, and sword play, if you love martial arts movies then this is your game.

reviews.review_title: Has the potential to be great!
reviews.review_description:
VR games in general are difficult to create/develop in the first place, so I'm honestly surprised in how good this game performs, especially knowing it's being developed by one person.  

There are a number of different modes/practices to experiment with, including a fun street style mode that has you fighting off a number of opponents at the same time.  You can use bricks or bottles or baseball bats while attacking or defending.  It can definitely get chaotic at times.  :)

My main complaint at the moment is that the music does not have a mute switch or slider to lower the volume, as I prefer to hear more of the game/ambient sound in the majority of games, other than rhythm-based of course.  The other drawback at this time is that there's no goal or specific challenges to strive for, meaning the initial enjoyment might dwindle rather quickly.  The dev has mentioned though that he will be adding a mute switch for the music and also continuing with further updates to keep the interest and fun-factor going.

I do think it's worth the price at this time, while knowing the dev does want to keep improving his game.  So the more people that purchase and play it can offer their feedback as well, and help make this game become great in the end.  I'm giving it 4 stars for now because the character movements and reactions are really good, along with the good looking environments, and once goals and challenges are added, I'm sure I'll up my rating to 5 stars.  Thanks.  :)

Potentially a 5 star game.
The NPC’s look incredible and have smooth fluid movements and realistic techniques.
The problems: you have no kicking ability and most importantly, the hit registers are way off.  The NPC’s record hits when they are not even close to you.  If it was an expensive game I would return it. But for $6 I will wait and see if updates make it playable.

developer_response.body:
thanks for the review! Yea i plan to add kick feature into game when there are good and cheap hip/leg tracking available to quest/quest2,, so I can implement realistic kicks and throws with hip/leg,, otherwise the kick can be quite off.. But theres no news from oculus yet. So I might very likely just add user kick animation in short future.   As for hit recording, the hitbox for player, especially for hands can be a bit large..  I will be fine tuning the sizes of hitbox in future..

ps. now I added basic kicks for player! pressing left/right primary button (X/A)will enable left/right push kicks!

Hi, thanks for the feedback anyways.. I will be polishing this game over times and adding more contents. But considering im the only one developing this as my hobby, theres a certain limit to my capability and capacity.. So sorry bro, if you don't like the game feel free to refund it according to metas policy..

reviews.review_description:
User Interface is quite crude, but the amount of content is really impressive. It's a fighting game so you can have workout and you can try different modes. 
I hope this game will be developed. For this price I recommend purchasing immediately.
Is there a discord for this game where we can get support and discuss things?

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks for the great review! I dont have discord set up yet, but you can reach me via email, I will be making updates in future in different martial art related topics. And yes UI is also on my to-do list to be rewired!

reviews.review_title: Add the ability to grab legs
reviews.review_description: I was doing the Judo mode, and though I know there are no leg grabs in modern sport Judo, traditionally, there have always been single leg, double leg, and fireman's carry throws.

developer_response.body: i believe you can grab leg in game, but you need to grab the pants just to give the hands a reference to attach onto, pls give it a try, i was able to do double leg and firemans!
